title: Razorpay UPI Circle Handler — Schema Bundle

BusinessConfig.description: Configuration for the Razorpay UPI Circle handler provided by the business. Declared in the business UCP profile at /.well-known/ucp.

key_id.description: Razorpay API key identifier for this business account (rzp_test_* for sandbox, rzp_live_* for production). Safe to advertise in the UCP profile. The key_secret MUST remain on the business backend and MUST NOT be included here.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment. Use 'sandbox' for test mode, 'production' for live mode.

merchant_name.description: Display name shown to users during the payment flow.

currency.description: Currency accepted by this handler. Defaults to 'INR' — UPI only supports INR transactions.

PlatformConfig.description: Platform-level configuration for the UPI Circle handler. Declared in the platform UCP profile.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment. Must match the business config environment.

upi_apps.description: Ordered list of UPI app identifiers the platform supports (e.g., 'phonepe', 'gpay', 'paytm', 'bhim'). Platform presents these in order.

PaymentMethodUPICircle.description: UPI Circle delegated payment method identifying the pre-authorized mandate. The delegate_id is an opaque persistent reference issued by Razorpay during one-time delegation setup — analogous to a card vault token.

delegate_id.description: Opaque persistent identifier for the UPI Circle mandate, issued by Razorpay during one-time delegation setup. Used by the platform to fetch a one-time credential before each transaction. Platforms MUST NOT parse or pattern-match this value.

user_vpa.description: User's UPI Virtual Payment Address linked to this delegation mandate. Optional — included for display purposes only.

Credential.description: One-time UPI Circle cryptogram fetched from Razorpay TSP before submitting Complete Checkout. Single-use and short-lived — authorizes exactly one delegated debit. Platforms MUST fetch a fresh credential for each transaction and MUST NOT reuse or submit an expired credential.

value.description: Base64-encoded one-time cryptogram issued by Razorpay TSP for this transaction

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this cryptogram expires. Platforms MUST check this before submitting and fetch a new credential if expired.

Allowance.description: Constraints on how the UPI Circle mandate can be used for a single transaction (amount limit, expiration, merchant)

reason.description: Usage pattern for this allowance; currently only one_time is supported

max_amount.description: Maximum charge amount in minor units (paise for INR). For UPI Circle, per-transaction limits are enforced by NPCI and the buyer's bank at the mandate level.

currency.description: ISO-4217 three-letter lowercase currency code (e.g., 'inr'). For UPI Circle, always 'inr'.

checkout_session_id.description: Identifier of the checkout session this payment is for

merchant_id.description: Unique identifier for the merchant authorized to use this delegation

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this allowance expires

DelegatePaymentRequest.description: Request to initiate a delegated UPI Circle payment using a pre-fetched one-time credential

payment_method.description: The UPI Circle payment method identifying the pre-authorized mandate

credential.description: One-time cryptogram fetched from Razorpay TSP for this specific transaction

allowance.description: Constraints on how this credential can be used for this transaction

DelegatePaymentResponse.description: Response confirming the delegated UPI Circle payment was accepted. PSP-specific confirmation values (e.g., payment_id, upi_txn_id) are returned in metadata for merchant reconciliation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this delegated payment record

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this delegated payment record was created

metadata.description: Metadata echoed from the request plus system-added fields. MAY include PSP-specific confirmation values such as payment_id and upi_txn_id for merchant reconciliation.

Error.description: Error response for UPI Circle delegated payment requests

code.description: Specific error code for programmatic handling

supported_versions.description: List of API versions supported by the server, ordered by preference (newest first). Only included in version-related errors.

example.message: UPI Circle mandate has expired and cannot be used for new payments
